visa_intro_1: Ma khadi a ngongole ndi Bitcoin ndi njira zolipirira, koma zimagwira ntchito mosiyana kwambiri.
visa_intro_2: Ma khadi a ngongole monga Visa ndi maukonde otsekeka olamulira ndi mabungwe a ndalama, pomwe Bitcoin ndi ukonde wotseguka womwe aliyense amatha kugwiritsa ntchito.
visa_intro_3: Tiyeni tione kusiyana pakati pa njira ziwiri za malipiro izi: Bitcoin ndi Visa.
point_1_summary_1: Bitcoin ndi ukonde wotseguka womwe aliyense amatha kulowa ndi kugwiritsa ntchito popanda chilolezo. Maukonde a ma khadi a ngongole monga Visa ndi maukonde otsekeka olamulira ndi mabungwe a ndalama omwe amatha kukana mwayi kwa aliyense.
point_1_summary_2: Izi zimapangitsa Bitcoin kukhala yophatikizira ndi yopezeka kwa anthu padziko lonse.
point_2_summary_1: Machitidwe a Bitcoin alibe malipiro kwa amalonda, pomwe makampani a ma khadi a ngongole nthawi zambiri amalandira pafupifupi 3% pa machitidwe aliwonse.
point_2_summary_2: Phunzirani momwe bizinesi yanu ingasunge ndalama
point_2_summary_3: polandira malipiro a Bitcoin m'malo molipira malipiro a ma khadi a ngongole.
point_3_summary_1: Bitcoin imagwira ntchito pa blockchain yoonetsa pomwe machitidwe onse amatha kutsimikizidwa ndi aliyense. Maukonde a ma khadi a ngongole amagwira ntchito ngati maukonde otsekeka.
point_3_summary_2: Kuonetsa kumeneku kumapangitsa Bitcoin kukhala yodalirika kwambiri.
point_4_summary_1: Makampani a ma khadi a ngongole amatha kuumitsa akaunti, kuletsa machitidwe, kapena kukana ntchito nthawi iliyonse. Bitcoin singaumitsidwe kapena kulamulira ndi olamulira aliyense.
point_4_summary_2: Ndi Bitcoin, mumasunga ulamuliro wa ndalama zanu ndipo simungathe kuduka pa dongosolo la malipiro.
point_5_summary_1: Ma khadi a ngongole amapanga ngongole yomwe ingadzazike chiwongo chokwera, nthawi zina kupitirira 25% pachaka.
point_5_summary_2: Machitidwe a Bitcoin ndi omaliza popanda kupanga ngongole - mutha kugwiritsa ntchito Bitcoin yomwe muli nayo yokha.
point_6_summary_1: Bitcoin imalola kusunga wekha, kutanthauza kuti mutha kusunga ndi kulamulira ndalama zanu popanda kudalira mabanki kapena opangitsa malipiro.
point_6_summary_3: kuti mumvetsetse momwe mungalangirire ndalama zanu. Ma khadi a ngongole amafuna nthawi zonse anthu apakati monga mabanki ndi opangitsa malipiro.
point_7_summary_1: Bitcoin imagwira ntchito 24/7 padziko lonse popanda maola a ntchito kapena malire a madera.
point_7_summary_2: Maukonde a ma khadi a ngongole ali ndi maola a ntchito, nthawi yokonzakonza, ndi malire a madera omwe amatha kuletsa machitidwe.
